song.title: Lord Jesus Christ We Would Remember Thee
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Lord Jesus Christ, We would remember Thee, As, on the table, We the emblems see; Thy holy body shadowed in the bread, Thy precious blood is in the cup portrayed.
[V2] 2) Lord, we adore Thee For Thy matchless grace, That Thou, for us, Did take the servant’s place; From Godhead’s glory to the shameful tree, From wealth, so vast, To abject poverty!
[V3] 3) O Lamb of God, We join to bless Thy name, That Thou, on Calv’ry, Bore our sin and shame; And, by Thy death, Did put our guilt away, Triumphant rose, Our night to turn to day.
[V4] 4) We see Thee now, At God’s right hand enthroned, Vested with honor and with glory crowned; Blessed Redeemer, Savior, Lord, to Thee Be all the glory, Pow’r and majesty!
song.author: Alfred P. Gibbs
